element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Designer Satoshi Nakai insisted on destructive environments as core mechanic
Strongest non-cheat weapon; requires ammo management
Mecha has minor air capabilities; introduces vertical combat challenges
Jake meets Major Beldark in Mission 4; final confrontation with Bildvorg
Failure triggers bad ending; requires precision timing
Strongest weapon available only via cheat code or secret discovery

typical_relief_triggers: Narrative cinematic (character portraits in JP version)
typical_tension_triggers: Allied unit death (Apollo killed by Beldark)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Mission-based structure with escalating difficulty; alternates between ground combat and aerial/space challenges; critical mission failures create permanent story consequences (bad ending)

spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Hidden Napalm Flamethrower weapon accessible via secret discovery or cheat code

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to mecha controls and basic combat with Vulcan weapon
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Advanced weapon acquisition (Laser); introduction of complex objectives (Mission 4-5 encounter with Beldark; Arc Nova defense)
difficulty_curve.late_game: Mission 6 mountain traverse with Versis requiring flight path navigation; final confrontation with Bildvorg; mission success determines ending variant
notable_spikes: Mission 4: First encounter with Major Beldark in combat; loss of allied unit Apollo
Mission 5: Arc Nova falling sequence (mission-critical timing; failure triggers bad ending)
Mission 6: Alpine mountain navigation with aerial combat requirements
Final Boss: Bildvorg confrontation determines game ending

notable_level_patterns.description: Missions deploy from warship Versis to various global battlefields; creates narrative framing and safe recovery point
Missions incorporate destructible environments and natural obstacles requiring mecha navigation skills
Major encounters (Beldark, Bildvorg) integrated into narrative progression; failure has story consequences
Time-sensitive tasks that determine ending outcome; success/failure affects narrative branching
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Mission 5 (Arc Nova defense; enemy shuttle escape prevention)
